zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Higgins於1706年7月13日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦時，她的父親Benjamin Higgins II24歲，母親Sarah Freeman24歲。她於1724年7月4日與Jesse R. Smith Sr.在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1766年11月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼夏洛特普特南享年60歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼夏洛特普特南。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Higgins于1706年7月13日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦时，她的父亲Benjamin Higgins II24岁，母亲Sarah Freeman24岁。她于1724年7月4日与Jesse R. Smith Sr.在美国马萨诸塞州巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1766年11月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼夏洛特普特南享年60岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼夏洛特普特南。

nameMeanings.name: Higgins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hUiginn ‘descendant of Uiginn’, a byname meaning ‘viking, sea-rover’ (from Old Norse víkingr). Compare McGuigan .

English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Higgin, itself either a Lancashire variant of Huggin (from a pet form of Hugh ), or a variant of Hickin (from a pet form of Richard ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. See Hick and compare Higson .

variants.name: McGuigan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Mairead.
Irish (northern): perhaps an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Uiginn ‘son of the viking’ (see Higgins 1).
Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Guagáin, a shortened form of Mag Eochagáin, son of Eochagán, a diminutive of Eochaidh ‘horseman’. Compare Geoghegan .

variants.name: Kiggins
meanings: Irish (Galway and Mayo) and Manx: shortened Anglicized form (with English excrescent -s) of Gaelic Mag Uiginn ‘son of the Viking’ (see Higgins ).

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Higgins was born on 13 July 1706, in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Benjamin Higgins II, was 24 and her mother, Sarah Freeman, was 24. She married Jesse R. Smith Sr. on 4 July 1724, in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 17 November 1766, in Putnam, Charlotte, New York Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 60, and was buried in Putnam, Charlotte, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Higgins est née le 13 juillet 1706, à Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Benjamin Higgins II, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Sarah Freeman, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Jesse R. Smith Sr. le 4 juillet 1724, à Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 novembre 1766, à Putnam, Charlotte, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Putnam, Charlotte, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Higgins am 13. Juli 1706 in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Benjamin Higgins II 24 und ihre Mutter Sarah Freeman 24. Sie hat am 4. Juli 1724 in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Jesse R. Smith Sr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. November 1766 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Putnam, Charlotte, New York Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Putnam, Charlotte, New York Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Higginsが1706年7月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルエアスサムで生まれた時，父Benjamin Higgins IIは24歳，母Sarah Freemanは24歳であった。1724年7月4日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州バーンスタブルエアスサムでJesse R. Smith Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1766年11月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーチャーロットプウトナムで60歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーチャーロットプウトナムにて埋葬された。

ko.Massachusetts Bay, British Colonial Amer: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이
ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Higgins(이)가 1706년 7월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Benjamin Higgins II(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Freeman(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1724년 7월 4일 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 이스섬에서 Jesse R. Smith Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1766년 11월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 찰로트 풋남에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 찰로트 풋남에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Higgins nasceu em 13 de julho de 1706, em Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Benjamin Higgins II, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Freeman, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Jesse R. Smith Sr. em 4 de julho de 1724, em Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de novembro de 1766, em Putnam, Charlotte, New York Colony, British Colonial America, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Putnam, Charlotte, New York Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay,: эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Putnam, Charlotte, New York, British Col: путнам, чарлотт, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay C: эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Massachusetts Bay, British Colonial Amer: массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Higgins родилась 13 июля 1706 г. в местности эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Benjamin Higgins II было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah Freeman, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jesse R. Smith Sr. 4 июля 1724 г. в местности эастам, барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 17 ноября 1766 г. в местности путнам, чарлотт, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности путнам, чарлотт, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Higgins nació el 13 de julio de 1706, en Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Benjamin Higgins II, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Sarah Freeman, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Jesse R. Smith Sr. el 4 de julio de 1724, en Eastham, Barnstable, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 17 de noviembre de 1766, en Putnam, Charlotte, New York Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Putnam, Charlotte, New York Colony, British Colonial America.
